title: polyalthia dubia var. glabriuscula
intro: Polyalthia dubia var. glabriuscula, also known as the lesser polyalthia or lesser tree-boon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Polyalthia dubia var. glabriuscula plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
